modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email addresses failing to populate and causing delivery errors

full_description_text: 
User is experiencing issues with email addresses not populating correctly.  
They cannot send emails to certain recipients.  
An error message indicates delivery failures for specific addresses.  
User also mentioned problems with viewing free/busy time in Outlook.
short_description: Email addresses failing to populate and causing delivery errors
description:
